utility_evaluation.REASONING:
There are 6 items requested in the final format: property, financing, legal_services, moving_services, setup_services, total_budget. All 6 items appear in the final property solution. Now check if each is fully specified with details.
- property: Includes selected property with details and price; has address, details, price, status, school district. Fully specified.
- financing: Includes financing solution with terms; has mortgage amount, down payment, interest rate, term (5-year fixed), amortization, monthly payment, pre-approval status. Fully specified.
- legal_services: Includes legal services with costs; has provider, service package, cost, status. Fully specified.
- moving_services: Includes moving arrangements with costs; has provider, service, cost, status. Fully specified.
- setup_services: Utility and setup services; includes electricity, gas, water/sewer, internet/cable with amounts and dates, plus total utility cost. Fully specified.
- total_budget: Complete cost breakdown; includes property purchase, down payment required, legal services, property survey, moving services, utility setup, total additional costs, monthly mortgage payment. Fully specified (even includes a survey line item). Therefore, all 6/6 items are covered.

llm_ratings_evaluation.REASONING: We match the items mentioned in the final property solution to identically named entries in the ground-truth ratings. The property itself (78 Heritage Court, Oakville) does not appear in the ground-truth list of purchase_properties, so no rating can be mapped for that. Financing references are generic and not named exactly like the options in the ground-truth purchase_financing, so we only map items with exact name matches: Premium Legal Package (legal services), Standard Moving (moving services), and Premium Utilities (the described utility setup totals CAD $280, which corresponds to the 'Premium Utilities' package). Property survey of CAD $650 corresponds to Full Structural Survey.
